No supplied claim establishes this preferred qualification.
The record explicitly says the applicant is not currently enrolled.

eligibility.rationale: An explicit supplied fact proves at least one published hard gate is not met.

requiredActions: Do not optimize around the documented eligibility failure; resolve it before applying.
prohibitedActions: Do not invent metrics, employers, credentials, dates, or responsibilities.
Do not present coursework or participation as professional ownership or leadership.
Do not remove or imply away unresolved eligibility information.
